title: JARM
description: Just another ruby mod with too many things
body:
# JARM
# HEADS UP: BEING REWRITTEN YET AGAIN
## May or may not be just another ruby mod 

JARM is a mod that adds alot of things to minecraft, all about rubies. 

## Dependencies
make sure you have the dependencies installed. It needs:

Forge:

- https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/architectury-forge

Fabric:

- https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/architectury-fabric
- https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api


## FAQ

Q) Images?

A) Look at the documentation


Q) I found a bug

A) Report it in github issues

Q) How tf do you make 2 versions with the exact same features

A) https://github.com/architectury


## Before reporting crash
- make sure its reproducable
- make sure you have all the dependencies installed for your platform
